Bada Bing & Co. a curated edit

91 pieces · five chapters · updated July 2026

Dress like the family

The Sopranos universe, bought carefully. Licensed relics and the North Jersey wardrobe around them: velour, gold, cedar, and espresso. Every link goes straight to the retailer.

Browse the record →
Exhibit A Exhibit B Exhibit C Exhibit D
Chapter I The Shrine 25 pieces Chapter II The Wardrobe 21 pieces Chapter III The Gold 16 pieces Chapter IV The Back Room 14 pieces Chapter V The Kitchen 15 pieces

The Gold

Worn open-collared, always. The horn keeps the malocchio away.

House rule No. 1
After hours

The back room and the kitchen. Business gets discussed over these.

Chapter IV

The Back Room

Cigars, brown liquor, cards. Business gets discussed after hours.

The record

The Sopranos™ and HBO are trademarks of their respective owners. Chapter I is the real, licensed thing. Chapters II through V are inspiration.

Prices and stock come from Channel3 and drift like anything else; confirm at the retailer.

The arrangement

Links are monetized. When you buy through one, this site earns a commission. Nobody gets hurt.
